## Checklist

- [ ] `plugin.json` is valid JSON and references existing files
- [ ] Any new SKILL.md has rich frontmatter `description` (>= 60 chars, lists trigger phrases)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] README/docs reflect any user-visible change
- [ ] Tested locally with `/plugin install ./` and a sample feature
